reviews.review_description: I think this is a great game but there is one problem the slide in the mountains map when you stick out your hands fast enough you can phase through the slide but all in a great game

reviews.review_title: This game is so peak!! W WAFER!
reviews.review_description: holy good game! Maybe add more cosmetics and more maps (horror mode?) otherwise, Loki great game. Good job wafer.
